items.title: Year-end Roundtable
items.description: Year-end roundtable hosted by Taipei convener Wei-Ting Chen, gathering local alumni for portfolio reviews and the year-ahead briefing.
items.descriptionZh: 由台北召集人陳維廷主持的年末圓桌會，匯集北區系友進行作品互評與來年規劃。

items.title: JB Alumni Casual Meet
items.description: Casual evening meetup organised by Mei-Ling Hsu for SCCD alumni based in Johor Bahru and nearby Singapore.
items.descriptionZh: 由許美玲召集的輕鬆夜聚，邀請新山及鄰近新加坡的系友共聚。

items.title: LA Alumni Studio Tour
items.description: Studio tour led by Kai-Cheng Lin, visiting three alumni-founded studios across DTLA over an afternoon.
items.descriptionZh: 由林楷程帶隊的工作室參訪，下午走訪洛杉磯市中心三間由系友創辦的工作室。

references.titleZh: LA 工作室參訪會議紀錄

items.title: Tokyo Design Walk
items.description: Walking tour organised by Pei-Ying Kuo around Omotesando design spots — typography studios, galleries and recently opened brand stores.
items.descriptionZh: 由郭佩穎策劃的散步活動，繞行表參道字體工作室、藝廊與近期開幕的品牌空間。

references.titleZh: 東京設計散步會議紀錄

items.title: NYC Alumni Mixer
items.description: Summer mixer hosted by Han-Wen Hsieh — relaxed cross-industry exchange between SCCD alumni working in NYC.
items.descriptionZh: 由謝瀚文主辦的夏日交流會，紐約系友跨產業輕鬆交流。

items.title: Mid-year Portfolio Night
items.description: Portfolio night hosted at Studio Verse — Taipei alumni share recent projects in a relaxed studio setting.
items.descriptionZh: 於 Studio Verse 舉辦的作品分享夜，台北系友在輕鬆的 studio 氛圍中分享近期作品。
